00008 #include "sprite/tests/test_common.hpp"
00009 #include "sprite/operators.hpp"
00010 #include "sprite/user_module.hpp"
00011

00016 
00019 struct firstlistModule : sprite::UserModule
00020 {
00021   // Constructor and operation ids.
00022   size_t c_Cons;
00023   size_t c_Nil;
00024   size_t op_concat;
00025 
00027   firstlistModule(Program & pgm) : UserModule(pgm)
00028   {
00029     c_Cons = install_ctor("Cons");
00030     c_Nil = install_ctor("Nil");
00031     op_concat = install_oper("concat", dt_concat);
00032 
00033     typedef firstlistModule M;
00034     using boost::assign::list_of;
00035 
00036     #define R(fun) std::tr1::bind<void>(&M::fun, this, _1, _2)
00037     dt_concat = DtSelect(list_of(0)
00038       , DtCase(c_Nil, R(rule0)
00039       , DtCase(c_Cons, R(rule1)
00040       )));
00041 
00042     // s_rule0_ctor0 = get_program().import("List")->find_ctor("Cons");
00043   }
00044 
00045   virtual ~firstlistModule() {}
00046   
00047 private:
00048 
00049   // Definitional trees.
00050   DTree dt_concat;
00051 
00052   // Local symbols (used in rule bodies).
00053   size_t s_rule0_ctor0;
00054 
00055   void rule0(Node & root, Node & /*unused*/) const { rewrite_fwd(root, root[1]); }
00056   void rule1(Node & root, Node & /*unused*/) const
00057   {
00058     rewrite_ctor(
00059         root, c_Cons, root[0][0]
00060       , Node::create<OPER>(op_concat, root[0][1], root[1])
00061       );
00062   }
00063 
00064   // ====== H function(s) ======
00065   #if 0
00066   struct HConcat
00067   {
00068     HConcat(firstlistModule const & this_) : This(this_) {}
00069   private:
00070     firstlistModule const & This;
00071   public:
00072     void operator()(Node & node, NodePtr & child) const
00073     {
00074       if(child->id() == This.c_Nil)
00075         return rewrite_fwd(node, node[1]);
00076       else
00077       {
00078         assert(child->id() == This.c_Cons);
00079         assert(child->arity() == 2);
00080         rewrite_ctor(
00081             node, This.c_Cons, (*child)[0]
00082           , Node::create<OPER>(This.op_concat, (*child)[1], node[1])
00083           );
00084         return;
00085       }
00086     }
00087   };
00088 
00089   void h_concat(Node & node) const
00090   {
00091     assert(node.arity() == 2);
00092     HConcat rule(*this);
00093     generic_hfunc<0>(node, rule);
00094 
00095     // NodePtr child = node[0];
00096     // switch(child->tag())
00097     // {
00098     //   // H.1
00099     //   case CHOICE: return pull_tab(node, child);
00100     //   // H.5
00101     //   case FAIL: return rewrite_fail(node);
00102     //   // H.2
00103     //   case OPER: return head_normalize(*child);
00104     //   // H.3
00105     //   case CTOR:
00106     //   {
00107     //     if(child->id() == c_Nil)
00108     //       return rewrite_fwd(node, node[1]);
00109     //     else
00110     //     {
00111     //       assert(child->id() == c_Cons);
00112     //       assert(child->arity() == 2);
00113     //       rewrite_ctor(
00114     //           node, c_Cons, (*child)[0]
00115     //         , Node::create<OPER>(op_concat, (*child)[1], node[1])
00116     //         );
00117     //       return;
00118     //     }
00119     //   }
00120     //   default: throw RuntimeError("Type error in concat");
00121     // }
00122   }
00123   #endif
00124 };
00125 #endif
00126 
00127 #else
00128 
00129 #if 0
00130 namespace sprite { namespace user { namespace m_9firstlist
00131 {
00132   enum Constructor
00133   {
00134     c_4Cons = CTOR,
00135     c_3Nil,
00136   };
00137   
00138   // ====== BEGIN GENERATED CODE ======
00139   struct Module : sprite::UserModule
00140   {
00141     size_t op_main;
00142     size_t op_concat;
00143   
00144     Module(Program & pgm) : UserModule(pgm)
00145     {
00146       // Operation initialization.  Each one is added to the program, which
00147       // returns a unique ID.  Afterwards, the symbols are referred to only by
00148       // their IDs.
00149       op_main = install_oper("main", &Module::H_main);
00150       op_concat = install_oper("concat", &Module::H_concat);
00151     }
00152   
00153     virtual ~Module() {}
00154   
00155     private:
00156     void H_main(Node & root) const
00157     {
00158       return rewrite_oper(root, op_concat, Node::create<CTOR>(c_4Cons, Node::create<INT>(1), Node::create<CTOR>(c_3Nil)), Node::create<CTOR>(c_4Cons, Node::create<INT>(2), Node::create<CTOR>(c_3Nil)));
00159     }
00160 
00161     void H_concat(Node & root) const
00162     {
00163       NodePtr parent, *inductive;
00164       SPRITE_SWITCH_BEGIN(root, parent, inductive, root, (0))
00165         case c_4Cons:
00166         {
00167           return rewrite_ctor(root, c_4Cons, root[0][0], Node::create<OPER>(op_concat, root[0][1], root[1]));
00168         }
00169         case c_3Nil:
00170         {
00171           return rewrite_fwd(root, root[1]);
00172         }
00173       SPRITE_SWITCH_END
00174     }
00175   };
00176 }}}
00177 #endif
00178 namespace sprite { namespace user { namespace m_9firstlist
00179 {
00180   enum Constructor
00181   {
00182     c_4Cons = CTOR,
00183     c_3Nil,
00184   };
00185 
00186   #ifndef SPRITE_HEADER_ONLY
00187   struct Module : sprite::UserModule
00188   {
00189     size_t op_4main;
00190     size_t op_6concat;
00191     size_t cl_4Cons;
00192     size_t cl_3Nil;
00193 
00194     Module(Program & pgm) : UserModule(pgm)
00195     {
00196       // Operation and constructor label initialization.  Each one is added to
00197       // the program, which returns a unique ID.  Afterwards, the symbols are
00198       // referred to only by their IDs.
00199       op_4main = install_oper("main", &Module::h_4main);
00200       op_6concat = install_oper("concat", &Module::h_6concat);
00201       cl_4Cons = install_ctor("Cons");
00202       cl_3Nil = install_ctor("Nil");
00203     }
00204 
00205     virtual ~Module() {}
00206 
00207   private:
00208     void h_4main(Node & root) const
00209     {
00210       return rewrite_oper(root, op_6concat, Node::create<CTOR>(c_4Cons, cl_4Cons, Node::create<INT>(1), Node::create<CTOR>(c_3Nil, cl_3Nil)), Node::create<CTOR>(c_4Cons, cl_4Cons, Node::create<INT>(2), Node::create<CTOR>(c_3Nil, cl_3Nil)));
00211     }
00212 
00213     void h_6concat(Node & root) const
00214     {
00215       NodePtr parent, *inductive;
00216       SPRITE_SWITCH_BEGIN(root, parent, inductive, root, (0))
00217         case c_3Nil: { return rewrite_fwd(root, root[1]);}
00218         case c_4Cons: { return rewrite_ctor(root, c_4Cons, cl_4Cons, root[0][0], Node::create<OPER>(op_6concat, root[0][1], root[1]));}
00219       SPRITE_SWITCH_END
00220     }
00221 
00222   };
00223   #endif // SPRITE_HEADER_ONLY
00224 }}}
00225 
00226 #endif
00227 // ====== END GENERATED CODE ======
00228 
00230 shared_ptr<Module> load_list(sprite::Program & pgm)
00231   { return boost::make_shared<sprite::user::m_9firstlist::Module>(tr1::ref(pgm)); }
00232 
00233 // This is a sample program to demonstrate the use of concat.  The output is
00234 // meant to be inspected visually.
00235 int test_main(int, char**)
00236 {
00237   using namespace sprite::user;
00238 
00239   // ====== DEFINE THE PROGRAM ======
00240 
00241   // Create a new program and make it the context for output.
00242   Program pgm;
00243   std::cout << setprogram(pgm);
00244 
00245   // Import the list module and capture a reference to it.
00246   shared_ptr<Module const> const _list = pgm.import("List");
00247 
00248   // Downcast the list module (alternatively, the abstract Module interface
00249   // could be used).
00250   shared_ptr<m_9firstlist::Module const> const list(
00251       dynamic_pointer_cast<m_9firstlist::Module const>(_list)
00252     );
00253 
00254   // DEBUG - print the linked program.
00255   std::cout << pgm << std::endl;
00256 
00257   // ====== FORM THE GOAL ======
00258 
00259   // Construct this goal: concat [1] [2]
00260   NodePtr lhs = Node::create<CTOR>(
00261       m_9firstlist::c_4Cons, list->cl_4Cons
00262     , Node::create<INT>(1), Node::create<CTOR>(m_9firstlist::c_3Nil, list->cl_3Nil)
00263     );
00264   NodePtr rhs = Node::create<CTOR>(
00265       m_9firstlist::c_4Cons, list->cl_4Cons
00266     , Node::create<INT>(2), Node::create<CTOR>(m_9firstlist::c_3Nil, list->cl_3Nil)
00267     );
00268   NodePtr goal = Node::create<OPER>(list->op_6concat, lhs, rhs);
00269   std::cout << *goal << std::endl;
00270 
00271   // ====== EXECUTE THE GOAL ======
00272 
00273   execute(pgm, *goal, TRACE);
00274   std::cout << *goal << std::endl;
00275 
00276   return 0;
00277 }
00278
